name.description: Comma-separated list of index template names used to limit the request. Wildcard (`*`) expressions are supported. To return all index templates, omit this parameter or use a value of `_all` or `*`.

flat_settings.description: If `true`, returns settings in flat format.

local.description: If `true`, the request retrieves information from the local node only.

master_timeout.description: Period to wait for a connection to the master node. If no response is received before the timeout expires, the request fails and returns an error.
